rationale: Used only in unexported struct field (cfg config.Config) and unexported helper resolveStorePath; no public signature exposure

store.Spawn in DecideStore.GetSpawn return; store.PermissionRow in DecideStore.GetPermissionRequest return; store.ErrNoOpenPermissionRequest and store.ErrAlreadyDecided returned via %w; add type aliases Spawn and PermissionRow; rewrite interface methods to use pkg/api alias names
DeleteStore interface uses no internal types; store.ErrSpawnNotFound used in function body only via errors.Is; no internal type in any exported signature
No internal/* imports
No internal/* imports; error sentinels defined with stdlib errors.New

config.Config in exported Expire(s ExpireStore, cfg config.Config, ...) function signature; resolved by scalar extraction — replaced cfg config.Config with retentionDays int; Client method reads c.cfg.Defaults.ExpireRetentionDays and passes the int, keeping standalone Expire exported and config-free
probe.Prober in exported FindMissing(ctx, s, p probe.Prober, ...) function signature; external consumers use only (c *Client).FindMissing(ctx); unexport standalone findMissing

store.Spawn in GetStore.GetSpawn return; store.PermissionRow in GetStore.GetPermissionRequest return; covered by shared aliases Spawn and PermissionRow in aliases.go; rewrite interface methods to use pkg/api alias names
No internal/* imports; imports only pkg/api/manifest (public sub-package of same module)

*store.Store in exported Kill(s *store.Store, ...) function signature; resolved by introducing KillStore narrow interface (GetSpawn only) and rewriting standalone Kill to accept KillStore — keeps Kill exported and testable without *store.Store in any public signature

store.ListFilters in ListStore.ListSpawns parameter; store.Spawn in ListStore.ListSpawns return; add alias type ListFilters = store.ListFilters (Spawn alias shared from decide/get); rewrite interface method to use pkg/api alias names

No internal/* imports
